⚡ RUSH HOUR
🍳 Cooking Battle Arena
Heating the kitchen...
Cooking Battle Arena
Overcooked-Style Chaos Kitchen
🎮 How to Play
📦

Step 1 — Pick Ingredients

Walk to the Ingredient Station and interact (E/Space/Button) to pick up a dish.

🔪

Step 2 — Chop

Go to the Chop Board and interact to chop the ingredients.

🔥

Step 3 — Cook

Move to the Stove and interact to cook. Don't leave it too long — it burns!

🪟

Step 4 — Serve

Rush to a Serve Window and press F/Serve to deliver. Build combos for bonus points!

⚡

Rush Hour!

When timer runs low, orders come faster. Stay focused and build combos!

W A S D Move
Arrows Move
E / Space Interact
F Serve
Esc Pause
D-Pad Mobile
🗺️ Select Level
Choose your challenge!
⚡ Kitchen Upgrades

Spend upgrade points earned from levels!
